source.videoTitle: 13-19 July 2026 Current Affairs 🔥 | Weekly MCQs | One Shot Revision | All Exams 2026

summary: This study material covers critical national and international developments from the second week of July 2026. Key announcements include the 72nd National Film Awards, where 'Article 370' and actor Yami Gautam won major accolades, alongside state-level schemes like the UP Mahila Udyam Nidhi Yojana and Delhi's Lakshmi Yojana. On the global stage, Andrew Burnham is set to succeed Keir Starmer as the Prime Minister of the United Kingdom. Environment and science developments highlight India's first national standards for mangrove restoration by BIS, the development of the nation's largest landslide warning system by IIT Mandi, and the return of the Indian Grey Hornbill to Gir National Park after six decades.
keyFacts: Yami Gautam won the Best Actress award at the 72nd National Film Awards 2026 for her role in the film Article 370.
The maximum collateral-free loan amount under the UP Mahila Udyam Nidhi Yojana 2026 is Rs 1 Lakh.
Andrew Burnham of the Labour Party is slated to succeed Starmer as the Prime Minister of the United Kingdom.
Aero India 2027, Asia's largest aerospace and defence exhibition, will be hosted in Bengaluru, Karnataka.
Sikkim tops the per capita income ranking of Indian states for 2026, while Bihar remains at the bottom.
IIT Mandi has developed India's largest landslide warning system.
The Bureau of Indian Standards (BIS) is preparing India's first National Standards for Mangrove Ecosystem Restoration.
The 31st Divya Kala Mela was inaugurated in Kolkata in July 2026.
Leprosy, caused by Mycobacterium leprae, has been declared a notifiable disease in Jammu and Kashmir.

mcqs.question: At the 72nd National Film Awards 2026, which film was awarded the 'Best Feature Film' and also secured the Best Actress award for Yami Gautam?
mcqs.explanation: At the 72nd National Film Awards 2026, the movie 'Article 370' won Best Feature Film, and its lead actress Yami Gautam won the Best Actress award.

mcqs.question: Under the UP Mahila Udyam Nidhi Yojana 2026, what is the maximum loan limit up to which female entrepreneurs are exempted from providing any collateral?
mcqs.explanation: Under the UP Mahila Udyam Nidhi Yojana, the loan range is from Rs 1,000 to Rs 1 lakh with a maximum interest rate of 4%. No collateral is required for loans up to Rs 1 lakh, but collateral is mandatory for amounts exceeding this limit.

mcqs.question: Andrew Burnham, who is set to become the next Prime Minister of the United Kingdom succeeding Starmer, belongs to which political party?
mcqs.explanation: Andrew Burnham belongs to the Labour Party and is set to succeed Keir Starmer as the Prime Minister of the United Kingdom.

mcqs.question: Which city has been designated to host Aero India 2027, Asia's largest aerospace and defence exhibition organized by the Ministry of Defence?
mcqs.explanation: Aero India 2027 will be held in Bengaluru, Karnataka. It is recognized as Asia's largest aerospace and defence exhibition.

mcqs.question: According to the per capita income rankings of Indian states for 2026, which state holds the highest position, and which state is at the bottom?
mcqs.explanation: Sikkim has the highest per capita income among Indian states, while Bihar remains at the bottom of the rankings.

mcqs.question: India's largest landslide warning system has been developed by which of the following institutions?
mcqs.explanation: IIT Mandi has developed India's largest landslide warning system to monitor and predict landslide activities in vulnerable hilly terrains.

mcqs.question: Which city set a Guinness World Record in July 2026 by planting over 3.61 lakh saplings in a single hour using the Miyawaki method?
mcqs.explanation: Ahmedabad created a Guinness World Record by planting over 3.61 lakh saplings in just one hour using the Japanese Miyawaki afforestation methodology.

mcqs.question: The 'e-SARAS' mobile application and portal, highlighted during the Digital India celebrations, is an official e-commerce platform run under which Union government scheme?

options.b: Deendayal Antyodaya Yojana - National Rural Livelihoods Mission (DAY-NRLM)
options.d: Mahatma Gandhi National Rural Employment Guarantee Scheme (MGNREGS)

mcqs.explanation: e-SARAS is an e-commerce platform designed to market products made by self-help groups (SHGs). It operates under the Deendayal Antyodaya Yojana - National Rural Livelihoods Mission (DAY-NRLM).

mcqs.question: Which organization is preparing India's first National Standards for Mangrove Ecosystem Restoration?
mcqs.explanation: The Bureau of Indian Standards (BIS) is formulating India's first-ever national standards for restoring and managing mangrove ecosystems.

mcqs.question: The Geographical Indication (GI) registry recently granted tags to 'Unjha Cumin' and 'Unjha Fennel'. Which Indian state are these products associated with?
mcqs.explanation: Unjha Cumin (Jeera) and Unjha Fennel (Saunf) are premium agricultural products belonging to Gujarat that recently received the Geographical Indication (GI) tags in 2026.

mcqs.question: The Delhi Government has renamed its 'Mahila Samriddhi Yojana' to which of the following names, offering Rs 2500 per month to eligible beneficiaries?
mcqs.explanation: The Delhi Government rebranded the Mahila Samriddhi Yojana as the Delhi Lakshmi Yojana, under which financial assistance of Rs 2500 per month is provided to eligible women.

mcqs.question: The Indian Grey Hornbill has returned to which of the following protected areas after a gap of more than 60 years?
mcqs.explanation: The Indian Grey Hornbill was sighted again in the Gir National Park, Gujarat, after a prolonged absence of over six decades.

mcqs.question: The India-UK Comprehensive Economic and Trade Agreement (CETA) came into official implementation on which date?
mcqs.explanation: The India-UK Comprehensive Economic and Trade Agreement (CETA) officially came into force on July 15, 2026.

mcqs.question: India hosted the fifth meeting of the BIMSTEC National Security Chiefs in July 2026. Where is the permanent secretariat of BIMSTEC located?
mcqs.explanation: While India hosted the 5th BIMSTEC National Security Chiefs meeting in New Delhi in July 2026, the permanent secretariat of BIMSTEC is located in Dhaka, Bangladesh.

mcqs.question: Which disease, caused by the bacterium Mycobacterium leprae, was recently declared a 'notifiable disease' in the Union Territory of Jammu and Kashmir?
mcqs.explanation: Leprosy, also historically known as Hansen's disease, is caused by Mycobacterium leprae and has been declared a notifiable disease in Jammu and Kashmir to ensure mandatory reporting of cases.
